n_a_brilliant: Initech accepts the carve-out language if breach notification stays at 24h and Ontario-only residency is non-negotiable. Counter focus shifts to insurance minimums and ISO 27001 evidence.
n_b_risky: Initech will route this to GC review and almost certainly pause the deal for 2-3 weeks. They have walked from comparable vendors at this stage; expect a polite 'we'll get back to you'.
n_c_blunder: Initech accepts in 24 hours and signs within the week. They wanted exactly this outcome.
